description_long: This is an orange ceramic cup with a glossy finish, featuring a large, rounded handle attached to one side. The front of the cup is decorated with a cute, cartoonish face, including large black eyes with white highlights, a small smiling mouth, and white accent marks resembling cheeks or tears. The cup has a smooth cylindrical body with a slightly flared rim and a flat base, making it stable when placed on flat surfaces. The interior is also orange and appears to be glazed for easy cleaning. The handle is ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip, and the cup is sized for typical beverage use. There are no visible logos, branding, or text, but the playful face design adds a decorative and whimsical touch.
description: A glossy orange ceramic cup with a large handle and a cute cartoon face on the front, featuring black eyes and a smiling mouth.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cartoon face with large black eyes, a smiling mouth, and decorative white marks.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large, rounded handle and a partial view of the face design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain orange surface and the full handle, with no decorative elements visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the side of the cup with part of the face and handle just out of sight.
